# `idx export` for [filesystem](/commands/categories/filesystem.md)

<div class='command-title'>Persist idx state to disk.</div>

## Signature

```> idx export {flags} (filepath)```

## Parameters

 -  `filepath`: Path where idx snapshot should be stored.


## Input/output types:

| input   | output |
| ------- | ------ |
| nothing | record |
## Examples

Save the current idx index to disk
```nu
> idx export ~/my-index.db

```

## Notes
The snapshot is stored as a SQLite database. Use `idx import` to reload it.
